Telegram sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker嘅tg link
(上website搵 / 直接喺tg 開返出嚟：setting> stickers > sticker側邊三點)
2. Tg 搵@stickerset2packbot
3. Command: /newpack
4. Paste link
5. Command: /finish png 512
6. Download .zip file and unzip
8. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包, upload .png/.webp
9. Done.

What'sApp sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker link, down落嚟, unzip file
2. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包

畀多啲誘因大家轉場，每日搬少少，識整可以一齊整／搬，主要都係由Tg/What'sApp搬過去。

1. 大家盡量留Tg/What'sApp sticker link會方便少少
2. 亦可以留低想要邊啲Sticker, 有時間就做
3. 如有現成Signal Sticker都可以填落去

Telegram sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker嘅tg link
(上website搵 / 直接喺tg 開返出嚟：setting> stickers > sticker側邊三點)
2. Tg 搵@stickerset2packbot
3. Command: /newpack
4. Paste link
5. Command: /finish png 512
6. Download .zip file and unzip
8. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包, upload .png/.webp
9. Done.

What'sApp sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker link, down落嚟, unzip file
2. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包

upload apng(識郁嘅圖)
signal就話300kb upload 唔到
建議唔好超過290kb
因為就算你upload到
張圖真會消失 = 用唔到

Telegram sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker嘅tg link
(上website搵 / 直接喺tg 開返出嚟：setting> stickers > sticker側邊三點)
2. Tg 搵@stickerset2packbot
3. Command: /newpack
4. Paste link
5. Command: /finish png 512
6. Download .zip file and unzip
8. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包, upload .png/.webp
9. Done.

What'sApp sticker to Signal
1. 搵Sticker link, down落嚟, unzip file
2. Signal Desktop Ver. : 上傳/製作貼圖包

signal就話300kb upload 唔到
